_meta.notes: Hyperbolic escape trajectory from Kerbin. Eccentricity > 1, sma negative (Telemachus convention for hyperbolic orbits). ApA is large/undefined in-game; Telemachus often reports a very large positive value. hasOrbit checks sma/ecc/ApR/PeR — all present, so diagram may render. isOrbiting=false (PeA < atmosphere threshold or the orbit doesn't close). Tests whether OrbitDiagram handles ecc>1 without throwing.
